title: Oh Maya Lyrics Irumugan Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Irumugan Oh Maya  Song Lyrics
Singer(s): N.C. Karunya & Ramya NSK

Haiyyo nenjilae
aadum oonjalae
innaal vaanilai
adada ada adadaa..

ahaa vaanilae
paadhai yaerudhae
paniyaai maarudhae
adada ada adadaa

otti kollavae
vaa en pakkamae
pakkam enbadhum
ingae dhoorame

yaenadi en thaedalai
ariyaamal ponaai
vaan meedhu
enai unakena
minikkiyavan
yaenadi en
minminiyai
paarkkaamal ponaai

kannae kadhali
kadhal maarvali
kaayam aavadhaa
kannai thaalthu ne

indrodu en thanimaigal
mudindhuvidum
naan vizhithaal
nee iiruppaai
unai alli serppaen

ennai unnidam
thandhaen seedhanam
aadum en manam
adayum aanandham

un veettil
ini enakoru
arai irukkum
naan irukkum
naal varaikkum
ada neeyum iruppai.

un thozhil
malar kodi ondru
padarndhirukkum
nee thaelikkum
neer inikkum
..thandhu adaippaai

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Oh Maya'?

The song 'Oh Maya' explores themes of love and attraction, capturing the playful essence of romance.

How does 'Oh Maya' fit into the plot of Irumugan?

This song is a celebration of love, showcasing the chemistry between the lead characters in the movie.

Who are the singers of 'Oh Maya'?

The song features the talented voices of Karunya NC and Ramya NSK.

Who composed the music for 'Oh Maya'?

The music for this lively track was composed by Harrish Jeyaraj.

When was 'Oh Maya' released?

'Oh Maya' was released on August 2, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: 'Oh Maya' is a lively duet that encapsulates the joy and excitement of young love, set against the backdrop of the film Irumugan. The song's upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics evoke feelings of happiness and celebration, making it perfect for festive occasions. With its engaging melody and vibrant performances by Karunya NC and Ramya NSK, it resonates with anyone who has experienced the thrill of romance. Overall, the track serves as a delightful reminder of the playful side of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Oh Maya from Irumugan is a vibrant duet that perfectly captures the essence of youthful love and celebration. With the dynamic vocals of Karunya NC and Ramya NSK, this track is sure to get you dancing. The infectious beats crafted by Harrish Jeyaraj make it a must-listen for anyone looking to uplift their spirits!
stanzaMeanings: Oh my heart, it dances like a wave, today the sky is like this, oh wow..
Ah, in the sky, the path is changing, oh wow..
Eyes speaking, no need for words anymore, oh wow..
Come close to me, saying 'come here', but it's still far away.
I have come here after many births.
Why did you leave without knowing my search? The sky above me, why did you not see my sparkle?
Oh..maya, are you the cloud? Oh..maya, is the desire burning?
Oh dear, love is like a treasure, is it true? You have to take care of your eyes.
You are the sound of my kiss, I have come here, the sky is beautiful..
Thinking of you, the days have passed, I will create joy for you.
Time is coming together, hands are joining, dreams are awakening.
Because of you, many nights have no mercy, I searched for you with my eyes closed.
This will end my loneliness, if I open my eyes, you will be there, I will embrace you.
Oh..maya, are you the cloud? Oh..maya, is the desire burning?
The sky is blue, the sea of love, the nature of the wind, is it love?
You and I live together in life, even if time passes, love is still there.
I have changed, I will ask the reason.. a ring on my finger.
I have given myself to you, my heart dances, my mind is filled with joy.
In your house, I will have a place, I will stay until the day you are there.
Your work is like a flower, you will bloom, you will bring joy, and give it all.
Oh ha... are you the cloud? Oh.. is the desire burning?
Oh..maya, are you the cloud? Oh..maya, is the desire burning?
